description: Major AI platform releases feature → viral social media art trend → character/brand coins launch within 24-48h
detection_signals: 1) Major AI platform (OpenAI ChatGPT Anthropic) releases visual feature 2) Viral art trend emerges on Twitter/X within 6h 3) High-profile tech figures (Musk Altman a16z) post examples 4) Multiple coins launch same theme within 24h 5) Reddit mentions spike 500%+
entry_criteria: 1) Detect AI platform release within 2h 2) Twitter mentions >2K in first 6h 3) High-profile poster (>1M followers) shares 4) First coin launches <24h after trend starts 5) Entry: First 2-4 hours of coin launch
exit_criteria: 1) 2x minimum (6% hit this) 2) 10x aggressive exit (1% hit this) 3) Time-based: 24h hold max 4) Trailing stop: 50% from peak
key_characteristics: Extremely fast peak (<24h). Requires AI platform event catalyst. High-profile social proof essential. Short window. Single successful case (Ghibli).

description: Fitness influencer's video goes mega-viral → branded items in video become coins within 24h
detection_signals: 1) Fitness influencer viral video (>5M views in 24h) 2) Specific branded product prominently featured 3) Meme-worthy moment or absurdist routine 4) Reddit mentions in r/fitness r/memes 5) Multiple coins from same video (competition signal)
entry_criteria: 1) Video hits >1M views in first 12h 2) Product/routine clearly identifiable 3) Reddit discussion threads appear 4) First coin launches <48h after video 5) Entry: First 4-8 hours of coin launch
exit_criteria: 1) 2x exit for 66% of stack 2) 5x exit for remaining 33% 3) Time-based: 72h hold max 4) Trailing stop: 40% from peak
key_characteristics: Moderate time to peak (60-62h). Requires mega-viral video. Multiple coins compete. Lower ROI than AI trends but more predictable.

description: AI bot/agent gains following → platform launches around bots → native token surges on influencer endorsement
detection_signals: 1) AI bot/agent has Twitter following >10K 2) Platform/social network built around AI agents 3) VC/tech influencer follows or mentions (a16z Naval) 4) Social mentions spike 300%+ in 24h 5) Major exchange lists token
entry_criteria: 1) Platform launches with working product 2) Bot has organic following (not bought) 3) VC/influencer endorsement confirmed 4) Exchange listing announced 5) Entry: Within 6h of influencer mention
exit_criteria: 1) 3x exit for 50% of stack (high volatility) 2) 10x exit for 25% 3) Keep 25% for potential 50x+ 4) Trailing stop: 60% from peak (crashes common)
key_characteristics: Extreme volatility (MOLT crashed 75%). Whale manipulation common. VC endorsement drives surge. High reward but catastrophic crash risk.

description: First-mover AI agent coin → establishes category → massive sustained growth
detection_signals: 1) Novel AI agent concept (first of kind) 2) Working AI bot with personality/content 3) Organic community building (not pump group) 4) Gradual holder accumulation (not instant pump) 5) Twitter following growth >500% in first week
entry_criteria: 1) Truly novel concept (check if already exists) 2) AI bot has content history (not just launched) 3) Holder distribution: 500+ within first hour 4) Liquidity locked or burned 5) Entry: Within first 24h of launch
exit_criteria: 1) 5x exit for 30% of stack 2) 25x exit for 40% 3) 50x+ exit for 30% 4) Time-based: Hold 7-14 days minimum 5) No trailing stop (long hold)
key_characteristics: Longest time to peak (132h = 5.5 days). Category creator advantage. Sustained growth not instant pump. GOAT example. Hard to identify 'first' in advance.

description: AI bot creates art/music/content autonomously → gains following → token launches
detection_signals: 1) AI bot autonomously creates content (not just reposts) 2) Content quality: subjective but gets engagement 3) Bot has consistent posting schedule 4) Platform: AgentFun or similar AI agent platform 5) Community discussion around bot's creations
entry_criteria: 1) Bot has 2+ weeks content history 2) Engagement rate >5% (likes/followers) 3) Platform launch confirmed 4) Early holder count <1000 5) Entry: Day 1-2 of platform launch
exit_criteria: 1) 2x exit for 40% 2) 10x exit for 40% 3) 30x+ hold for 20% 4) Time-based: 7 day minimum hold 5) Trailing stop: 50% from peak
key_characteristics: Slower growth than original AI agents. Requires creative quality assessment (subjective). Medium time to peak (~6 days). ZEREBRO example.

description: AI bot with absurdist humor/personality → meme coin launches riding AI meta wave
detection_signals: 1) AI bot with distinct personality (humor sarcasm absurdism) 2) Launched during existing AI agent meta (not category creator) 3) Relatability: humor resonates with crypto Twitter 4) Fast follower growth (but lower than originals) 5) Multiple similar coins launching (meta is hot)
entry_criteria: 1) Active AI agent meta ongoing (check existing AI coins pumping) 2) Bot personality is meme-worthy 3) Early holder count 200+ in first hour 4) Liquidity: Check for rug risk 5) Entry: First 12h of launch
exit_criteria: 1) 2x exit for 60% of stack (fast in/out) 2) 10x exit for 30% 3) 20x+ hold for 10% 4) Time-based: 72h hold max 5) Tight trailing stop: 30% from peak
key_characteristics: Riding meta wave not creating it. Faster peak (66h) than creative agents. Higher rug risk. FARTCOIN example. Requires existing AI meta.

description: AI bots for companionship/relationships → platform launches → token surges
detection_signals: 1) AI companion/relationship bot concept 2) Platform infrastructure (not just single bot) 3) Launched during AI agent meta wave 4) Reddit mentions in r/singularity r/futurology 5) Ethical concerns drive virality (ironically)
entry_criteria: 1) Platform has multiple bots not single 2) Some proof of working product 3) Holder count 300+ first hour 4) No major red flags (anonymous team = caution) 5) Entry: First 24h of platform launch
exit_criteria: 1) 2x exit for 50% 2) 8x exit for 35% 3) 20x+ hold for 15% 4) Time-based: 96h (4 days) hold 5) Trailing stop: 45% from peak
key_characteristics: Moderate time to peak (92h = 3.8 days). Ethical controversy drives attention. AIC example. Platform risk (might get shut down).
